title: Stop Stuffing Controllers — Service Classes in Laravel
excerpt: Fat controllers are the most common smell in Laravel apps I inherit. A simple service-class pattern unblocks testing, reuse, and queue handlers — without bringing in a heavy architecture book.

title: The Eloquent N+1 Trap That Killed My Page Load
excerpt: A 200ms list page became 8 seconds after a single innocent template change. The fix took two characters. Notes on detecting and killing N+1 queries in Laravel for good.

title: Why I Still Reach for Yii2 GII for Internal Tools
excerpt: Yii2 isn't trendy in 2026 but its GII scaffolder still gets me from "new requirement" to "working admin" faster than any modern framework for CRUD-heavy back-office tools.

title: Three useEffect Traps That Bit Me in Production
excerpt: Stale closures, missing cleanups, and the dep-array lie. Three useEffect bugs that shipped past code review and what I do now to avoid them.

title: Alpine.js + Blade: The Boring Stack That Ships Fast
excerpt: Not every Laravel admin needs React, Vue, or Livewire. Alpine.js + Blade gets you 80% of the way with 10KB of JS — and zero build step. When boring is the right answer.
